en.text: a primitive root; to split or open, i.e. (literally, but only as denominative from H8179); compare see H7778 to act as gatekeeper; (figuratively) to estimate

senses.gloss_en: a primitive root; to split or open, i.e. (literally, but only as denominative from H8179); compare see H7778 to act as gatekeeper; (figuratively) to estimate
